scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @latchkey/core && npm run build --workspace @latchkey/mcp && npm run build --workspace @latchkey/webhook
scripts.init: npm run build && node packages/mcp/build/cli/latchkey.js init
scripts.start:latchkey: npm run build && node packages/mcp/build/cli/latchkey.js start
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @latchkey/core && npm run build --workspace @latchkey/core && npm run typecheck --workspace @latchkey/mcp && npm run typecheck --workspace @latchkey/webhook
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @latchkey/core && npm run test --workspace @latchkey/mcp && npm run test --workspace @latchkey/webhook
